53.reason: [When n == 0, a0 is NULL and schtree is called with NULL pointer, causing undefined behavior or crash. Also, when inserting the first node, 'p' is uninitialized but not used due to ch==0, which is correct, but for n==0, calling schtree(a0,1) passes NULL.]
